selected.description: Whether the row is currently selected.

selectedState.description:
Accessible state mapping for selected rows.
Use `pressed` for in-page selectable rows and `current` for navigation/current-item rows.

currentValue.description: `aria-current` value used when `selectedState="current"` and `selected` is true.

style.description: Inline style string applied to the `.cinder-action-row` root.

unsupportedProps.name: leading
unsupportedProps.description: Leading visual such as an icon, avatar, marker, or status dot.

unsupportedProps.name: meta
unsupportedProps.description: Tertiary metadata such as timestamp, status text, or a compact badge.

unsupportedProps.name: title
unsupportedProps.description: Primary row label. Required so the row has visible text and an accessible name.

unsupportedProps.name: trailing
unsupportedProps.description: Trailing region such as a timestamp, count, badge, chevron, or shortcut hint.
